positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. Dominant subjects include large, bioluminescent mushrooms glowing soft neon blues and vibrant greens, intertwined with gently drifting constellations made of stardust and delicate, stylized branches. The background features soft gradients of twilight purple and deep indigo, giving a sense of deep space and nature combined. The composition is centered, emphasizing the contrast between the organic, earthly elements and the cosmic glow. Style should be neo-whimsical art deco meets stained glass, featuring clean, thick outlines and vibrant, saturated colors with controlled shading. Suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Silhouette should be strong and easily defined against the background.
